title: Glossary
subtitle: Registered terms are applied consistently across every translation.
importTooltip: Pick a CSV file with a source,target header to import terms
exportTooltip: Builds a CSV of all terms and copies it to the clipboard

sync.tooltip: Pull approved community terms and translation memory from moru.gg (last: {{version}})

reset.tooltip: Deletes all manual and extracted terms (vanilla/community terms are kept)
reset.title: Reset glossary
reset.body: Delete {{count}} manual and extracted terms? Vanilla and community terms are managed by sync and will be kept. This cannot be undone.

empty.title: No terms registered yet
empty.desc: Registered terms are applied consistently across every translation.

footer.syncTooltip: Available once the web platform launches
